description: Wave 10: Final push to 500. Mix of all factions, more diversity, more iteration pairs, more rejection variety.
style_prefix: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring civilization, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background
negative: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

subjects.prompt: human male paramedic in his 30s with a runner build, wearing a charcoal tactical undersuit with a high-visibility medical vest bearing red crosses and emergency response patches, a compact defibrillator unit on his back in a quick-release harness, medical scanner on a wrist mount, blood-type tag around his neck, anti-contamination boots, he responds to emergencies on the station and his vest has scorch marks from a cargo bay fire three months ago

human woman in her 40s with intense focus lines around her eyes from decades of staring at star charts, wearing a steel-blue nav department uniform with cartography specialist insignia, a multi-screen wrist display showing coordinate overlays, a stylus behind each ear, comfortable desk shoes because she rarely leaves the chart room, her uniform is clean but has ink stains on the cuffs from manual notation habits she cannot break

large human male brig guard in his 30s with a bored expression that hides constant alertness, wearing a charcoal security uniform with a reinforced collar and anti-bite sleeve covers on both forearms, a shock baton in a hip holster, a key ring of magnetic cell access cards, heavy boots, a personal restraint kit on the back of his belt, he watches prisoners for twelve-hour shifts and has learned patience the hard way

quiet human woman in her 60s who manages the station data archive, wearing a soft blue-grey civilian cardigan over a cream blouse, comfortable skirt, practical flat shoes, reading glasses that she is always looking for, a data tablet that contains the index to every record on the station, she is the memory of the institution and she remembers everything including things people wish she would forget

intense human male in his 30s with a hoarse voice from giving speeches in cargo bays, wearing a charcoal deckhand undersuit with a worker solidarity armband in faded red tied around his left bicep, a leaflet data chip dispenser on his belt, scuffed boots, he organizes the deckhands for better shift rotations and the officers do not like him but they cannot fire him because the crew would walk

human woman in her 40s with curious bright eyes and specimen stains on her lab coat, wearing a cream-ivory science division coat over a charcoal undersuit, specialized specimen handling gloves in a chest pocket, a portable microscope on a neck lanyard, sample collection vials in a belt pouch, comfortable anti-slip shoes, her coat has a faint Keth pheromone smell that she has stopped noticing

elderly human man in his 70s who retired from the fleet and lives on a station with his partner, wearing a comfortable civilian version of the charcoal thermal undersuit modified for easy dressing with magnetic closures instead of zippers, a cane with a magnetic tip, soft slippers, a personal medical monitor on his wrist, a faded fleet service pin on his collar that he puts on every morning out of forty years of habit

human woman pilot in her 30s who is seven months pregnant and still flying desk duty, wearing an olive flight suit with the waist panel let out and a support belt added, flight patches still on the shoulders, deck shoes instead of flight boots, her flight goggles clipped to the flight suit collar because she refuses to take them off entirely, a data tablet with flight schedules she is managing instead of flying, annoyed expression

human male in his 50s in a powered wheelchair adapted for station corridors, wearing a Compact uniform jacket buttoned over a thermal undersuit with rank tabs from a previous era, the jacket has been tailored to work while seated, his legs are covered with a uniform blanket, a data tablet in his lap, a veteran service medal pinned to his chest, he advises the current command staff and they listen because he was there

tall broad female reptilian alien with dark bronze-green overlapping scales and a crest ridge bearing two honor notches, amber slit-pupil eyes, muscular tail with a battle scar, wearing dark bronze forged plate armor with an asymmetric design — heavier on the weapon side lighter on the shield side, leather arm wraps with bronze studs, a curved blade and a round bronze buckler, crimson sash knotted at the hip, house badge visible, she fights in a different style than the male warriors and her armor reflects that

ancient reptilian alien with faded grey-green scales and a massive crest ridge worn smooth by decades, milky amber eyes that can barely see but he does not need to see to fight, a heavy scarred tail missing the last three inches, wearing dark bronze armor that has been repaired so many times every plate is a different shade of patina, a faded crimson sash that was bright red fifty years ago, an old sword that has been resharpened until the blade is half its original width, he trains the young warriors and they are terrified of him

adolescent female reptilian alien with bright green scales that have not developed their adult pattern, a small crest ridge just starting to grow, big amber eyes, a thin restless tail, wearing a simple dark hide training tunic and leather leg wraps, carrying a wooden practice sword, she is gangly and not yet comfortable in her own body but there is a fierce determination in her stance that suggests she will be formidable

tall weathered reptilian alien with dark scales and a prominent crest bearing a ship-command seal cap, amber eyes that have navigated through hostile space, a thick steady tail, wearing practical dark leather shipboard clothes with bronze reinforcement at the shoulders and elbows rather than full ceremony armor, a navigation tool on a belt clip, a sidearm that looks more functional than ornamental, he commands a warship and dresses for the bridge not the arena

gentle female reptilian alien with warm amber-brown scales and a smooth low crest, soft amber eyes, a calm relaxed tail, wearing layered dark earth-toned robes with many internal pockets for dried herbs and plant specimens, a mortar and pestle hanging from her belt in a leather case, soft-soled shoes, her hands are stained green from grinding plant matter, she makes medicines from traditional Veshan herbal knowledge and warriors come to her quietly when the surgeons cannot help

human woman in her 30s who does hull repair in the Reach, wearing a heavily modified welding suit assembled from three different suits patched together, a welding visor pushed up showing goggle marks around her eyes, thick insulated gloves with patches, mag-lock boots that are the one piece of gear she bought rather than stole because your boots have to work in vacuum, a plasma cutter on a hip chain

skinny human teenage boy who serves as a lookout for a Reach crew, wearing too-large clothes from someone bigger — a dark thermal jacket with the sleeves rolled up four times, rope-belted trousers, one boot, a pair of binoculars that are the most expensive thing he has ever held hanging around his neck, he sits in high places for hours watching for patrol ships and his only job is to not fall asleep

middle-aged reptilian alien Veshan who practices medicine in the Reach outside any house authority, olive-green scales with stress discoloration, a filed-down crest indicating exile or voluntary departure, wearing a mix of Veshan leather with human medical supplies strapped on, a surgical kit in a worn leather case, the Veshan medical knowledge is different from human medicine and both populations come to this doctor because the alternatives are worse

human woman in her 20s who makes art from scrap metal and sells it on the docks, wearing paint-splattered work clothes over a thermal undersuit, a welding visor on a headband, heavy gloves pushed up to her elbows, steel-toe boots, multiple small sculptures hanging from her belt like trophies, she is the Reach version of culture — making beauty from wreckage

ancient human male in his 70s who has been a pirate so long he has become respectable by default, wearing a collection of quality gear accumulated over fifty years — a naval coat from three captains ago, boots that have been resoled six times, a sidearm so old it is practically an antique, his clothes are the best-maintained salvage in the Reach because he has had decades to curate them, everyone calls him old man and nobody crosses him
tall reptilian alien with green scales, brow ridges, amber eyes, crest, wearing bronze armor, crimson sash, a sword

tall imposing reptilian alien with dark green-grey overlapping scales scarred white from dozens of fights across the snout and chest, a prominent bony crest ridge from heavy brow ridges to the crown bearing three filed notch-marks indicating kills, fierce amber slit-pupil eyes under scarred brow plates, lipless jaw clenched showing worn teeth, barrel chest with aggressive forward lean, thick powerful tail held high and scarred at the base where two scales are missing from an old wound, wearing heavy master-forged dark bronze plate armor shaped to follow the natural scale ridges with visible forge hammer marks and deliberate imperfections left by the house smith, each dent and repair on the armor represents a specific fight, a faded crimson house sash knotted at the waist over dark cured leather underpadding stained with conditioning oil and old sweat, bronze vambraces dented and scratched on both forearms, a belt of metal honor tokens some clearly taken from defeated opponents, a heavy straight-bladed sword in a battered leather sheath at the hip with a house seal on the pommel
human woman with shaved head wearing salvaged armor pieces over dark clothes, a pistol, mismatched boots

human woman in her 30s with a shaved head and a crude faction brand burned into her forearm showing allegiance to a specific Reach crew, wearing mismatched salvaged armor pieces strapped over a torn charcoal thermal undersuit — one shoulder plate clearly cut from ship hull plating and welded to a leather strap showing arc-weld marks, a Compact-issue sidearm with the serial number filed off in a handmade kydex holster that still smells of the chemical set, boots from two different pairs one black Compact regulation one brown civilian both worn at the heels, a rust and ash color palette that is partly choice and partly the color everything turns after enough time in the Reach, a small knife in a boot sheath that she has used more than the pistol

human male in a brightly colored cartoonish outfit with a llama-head backpack, oversized sneakers with glowing soles, a pickaxe harvesting tool, emote-ready pose, the colors are bright purple yellow and cyan, every element is designed for maximum visual pop and zero functional purpose, this is a battle royale skin not a person who lives and works in space

human male in full traditional Japanese samurai armor with a kabuto helmet, face guard, layered do chest armor, sode shoulder guards, a katana and wakizashi, the armor is lacquered red and black with gold mon crests, this is historically accurate feudal Japanese armor not sci-fi, the craftsmanship is beautiful but it belongs in a different millennium

attractive young woman in a retro 1940s pin-up style space outfit — a cropped flight jacket over a bikini top, high-waisted shorts, platform heels, victory rolls in her hair, bright red lipstick, sitting on a rocket with a wink, this is mid-century nostalgia illustration not lived-in sci-fi, the aesthetic prioritizes sex appeal and retro charm over any functional reality

human male in impossibly ornate MMORPG-style armor with enormous shoulder pauldrons bigger than his head, a glowing enchanted sword with particle effects, a flowing cloak with magical runes, the armor has seventeen different materials and colors including glowing blue crystals and ethereal wisps, no human being could walk in this armor let alone work on a ship, this is a video game character sheet not a concept for a real person
